arabic:
وعن عمران بن حصين رضي الله عنهما قال‏:‏ سمعت رسول الله  صلى الله عليه وسلم  يقول‏:‏ ‏
"‏ما بين خلق آدم إلى قيام الساعة أمر أكبر من الدجال‏"‏‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: 'Imran bin Hussain (May Allah be pleased with them) reported:
english.text: I heard the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) saying, "Between time of the creation of Adam and the Resurrection Day, there is nothing greater than the mischief of Dajjal (the Antichrist).".

chapter.english: The Book of Miscellaneous ahadith of Significant Values
